channel.title: Comments on: Avery Brewing Company: Avery IPA, Ep. 155
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Paul Leone
item.dc:creator: Paul Leone
item.description: Thnak Ryan!! I am not familiar with Brooklyn's Campanion, but we are big fans of almost everything they do. I was hoping for a Local 3 but haven't seen it yet. Happy New Year to you and heres to a better 2012 - Cheers!!
item.content:encoded: Thnak Ryan!! I am not familiar with Brooklyn’s Campanion, but we are big fans of almost everything they do. I was hoping for a Local 3 but haven’t seen it yet. Happy New Year to you and heres to a better 2012 – Cheers!!

item.title: By: Ryan
item.dc:creator: Ryan
item.description: Thanks for all the great episodes this year! I just of back from New York and I toured the Brooklyn brewery. They have a new beer that you can only get at the brewery called Companion. It comes with Garrett Oliver book and I tried it up there. I love the Local 2, it is my top 3, but the Companion is just amazing! Have any of you guys had this Brooklyn brew.
item.content:encoded:
Thanks for all the great episodes this year!
I just of back from New York and I toured the Brooklyn brewery. They have a new beer that you can only get at the brewery called Companion. It comes with Garrett Oliver book and I tried it up there. I love the Local 2, it is my top 3, but the Companion is just amazing! Have any of you guys had this Brooklyn brew.

item.title: By: Mark
item.dc:creator: Mark
item.description: Thanks for another great episode of beeramerica.tv Enjoy the holidays.
item.content:encoded: Thanks for another great episode of beeramerica.tv Enjoy the holidays.

item.title: By: Paul Leone
item.dc:creator: Paul Leone
item.description: Merry Christmas and happy new year to you Marco!!
item.content:encoded: Merry Christmas and happy new year to you Marco!!
